excluded: a claim that PhaseWrap-RoPE is a validated RoPE replacement
supported: A deterministic multi-initialization full-context retrieval-attention comparison on Stage 12 non-phase-cued rows.
Every positional variant uses the same four learned attention parameters, optimizer, epochs, and train/test split.
Confidence intervals over initialization seeds and explicit weak-run reporting.

model.trained_parameters: bias, content-match scale, positional scale, content-position interaction scale

task.description: Full-prefix non-phase-cued passkey, multi-needle, and aggregation-style retrieval over Stage 12 rows.
task.scope: This is a learned full-context retrieval-attention harness, not a full decoder-only language-model benchmark.
task.target_construction: Targets are selected by explicit retrieval rules, not by the PhaseWrap score.
